\title{Fixture Paper for Paper Audit}
\begin{document}
\begin{abstract}
We claim state-of-the-art long-context reasoning with strong improvements over prior work.
\end{abstract}
\section{Introduction}
This paper compares against multiple baselines and argues that the proposed method is broadly superior.
\section{Method}
We define a calibration constant c and assume fixed comparison conditions across all runs.
\section{Results}
Our method improves accuracy by 12.4 over the baseline and outperforms prior work in the main setting.
\section{Appendix}
Table A reports the same metric as 10.1 under a different aggregation rule.
\section{Conclusion}
We conclude that the method is broadly effective and novel relative to the closest prior work.
\end{document}
